title: Cobblemon: Schwertchen's Fakemon
description:
Random fakemons for Cobblemon I created for my own use.
Will update it whenever I have new ideas.
Hope you enjoy.
body:
## Schwertchen's Fakemon [Cobblemon]

This datapack for Cobblemon adds new Fakemon that I created for fun to your world. 

### How to install

Download the .zip file and add it in **both** "resourcepacks" folder and "datapacks" folder of your world. 

Updating the datapack in an existing world, could have unpleasant side effects. \
As I often make changes from version to version, including: 
1. Stats/-distribution
2. Move pools
3. Models, Animations and Textures

With each new update I will only indicate the new Fakemon, but that doesn't mean that I haven't made any other changes, let yourself surprise and discover other changes.

### Future of this datapack

Im still learning all of this so I will adjust this datapack from time to time: \
Updates won't come regularly because I have to find the time and motivation.

## Added Fakemon

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Version 1.0 [Cobblemon 1.4.1]
• **Flarin** - Ice|Fairy - cold biomes - natural \
• **Sable** - Dark|Ghost - overworld - natural|gemstones \
• **Eyemo** - Dark|Ghost - evolution \
_( Sable , lvl=55 )_
### Version 1.1 [Cobblemon 1.4.1]
• **Egglette** - Ground|Flying - plains biomes - natural \
• **Goolette** - Ground|Flying - plains biomes - natural - evolution \
_( Egglette , lvl=21 )_ \
• **Upstitute** - Ghost - deep dark biomes - natural \
• **Domstitute** - Ghost - deep dark biomes - natural - evolution \
_( Upstitute , lvl=45 )_ \
• **Uneon** - Normal - evolution \
_( Evoli , lvl=100 , friendship=255 , world=the_end , interact=nether_star )_ \
• **Shuckleion** - Bug|Rock - evolution \
_( Shuckle , lvl=38 )_ 
### Version 1.2 [Cobblemon 1.5.2]
• **Bluragon** - Bug|Water - fossil - amethyst shard 
### Version 1.3 [Cobblemon 1.5.2]
• **Comice** - Electric - caves \
• **Mineolu** - Steel|Dark  - mountain night - evolution \
_( Riolu , interact=razor_fang )_ \
• **Tauross** - Normal|Ghost - grassland night \
_( since v1.4 Eldorian Tauros )_ 
### Version 1.4 [Cobblemon 1.5.2]
• **Glimmerdash** - Fairy|Ground - desert \
• **Fencerott** - Water|Fairy - evolution \
_( Dewott , lvl=36 )_ \
• **Scorchamp** - Electric|Fire - bamboo,jungle \
• **Tempestide** - Flying|Electric - evolution \
_( Corvisquire , lvl=36 , interact=nether_star (as soon it is ingame: relic_crown) )_ \
• **Desolith** - Rock|Fire - evolution \
_( Pupitar , lvl=36 , interact=nether_star (as soon it is ingame: relic_band) )_ \
• **Eldorian Heracross** - Dragon|Fighting - hills 

</details>



## Dependencies

Cobblemon [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon)
